item.title: torvalds pushed linux
item.author: GitHub Public Timeline Feed
item.description:
torvalds pushed to master in torvalds/linux · April 7, 2026 19:26
2 commits to master
  • 7b3b1e5
    PCI: hv: Set default NUMA node to 0 for devices without affinity info
  • b6422df
    PCI: hv: Fix double ida_free in hv_pci_probe error path
  • 13 more commits »
